Speaker 1: I didn't know you knew about that.
man: Well, I did and it hurt. That's when I wrote the song: "Betrayal In The Common Room".
Speaker 1:  Man... I... I'm sorry.
man: Look it was a lo-o-ong time ago.
Speaker 1: So, eh. I made out with Adrienne and you made out with Missy. Well I guess we're even.
man: Hmm mmmhm..
Speaker 1: We are even, right?
man: Just one more thing. I was so pissed at you that night that I wanted to get back at you. So I thought, who does Ross like the more than anybody?
